name: raycast-perplexity
title: Perplexity AI
description: Search and research with Perplexity AI — streaming answers, citations, domain filters, and Deep Research
author: will

commands.name: quick-ask
commands.title: Ask Perplexity
commands.subtitle: Sonar Pro
commands.description: Ask anything — get a streamed answer with citations

commands.name: web-search
commands.title: Web Search
commands.subtitle: Search API
commands.description: Raw ranked web search results with filtering

commands.name: ask-selection
commands.title: Ask About Selection
commands.subtitle: Sonar Pro
commands.description: Send selected text to Perplexity and copy the answer

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Perplexity API Key
preferences.description: Your Perplexity API key from perplexity.ai/settings/api

preferences.name: saveHistory
preferences.title: Save History
preferences.description: Save queries and answers to local history
preferences.label: Save search history locally

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
